examples: A resistible attack; such resistible temptations.
Hollow glass door, dew-congealing resistible, high transparency;
Made of quality stainless steel, the roller is resistible to high pressure, high temperature, erosion and distortion.
The theatre's critically acclaimed production of Bertolt Brecht's The Resistible Rise of Artuto Ui will return after running last summer.
Henry Goodman won best performance in a play for The Resistible Rise of Arturo Ui, also from the Chichester theatre.
